document: Guidelines on physical activity, sedentary behaviour and sleep for children under 5 years of age

recommendations.label: 0-3 months
recommendations.notes: Newborns typically sleep in 1-2 hour stretches throughout the day and night.

recommendations.label: 3-4 months
recommendations.notes: Infants begin to develop more regular sleep patterns.

recommendations.label: 4-11 months
recommendations.notes: Infants typically take 2-3 naps during the day.

recommendations.label: 1-2 years
recommendations.notes: Toddlers typically take 1-2 naps during the day.

recommendations.label: 2-3 years
recommendations.notes: Most toddlers still need one afternoon nap.

recommendations.label: 3-4 years
recommendations.notes: Some children may stop napping during this period.

qualityGuidelines.goodSleep: Quality sleep with regular sleep and wake times contributes to better health outcomes.
sleepHygiene: Cool, quiet, and dark sleeping environment
